title: pteris quadriaurita subsp. catoptera
intro: Pteris quadriaurita subsp. catoptera, also known as the four-veined fern or catoptera fern, is a subspecies of fern in the family Pteridaceae, native to parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Pteris quadriaurita subsp. catoptera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, among others. Pteris quadriaurita subsp. catoptera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
